title: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri May 30, 2025 12:53 am tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Includes theatrical editions. Edit: Some mod please fix the typo in the title.

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by mastafishere » Fri May 30, 2025 8:08 am Absolutely incredible that they'll be getting a separate Blu-ray for every iteration. I'm jealous that there's no way in hell that we'll get that here but I'm excited that this likely means we in the US will be getting a 4K box set sometime in the next 1-2 years.

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri May 30, 2025 8:49 am No! They can't do this to me! I'm too poor right now!

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by AlphaZero » Fri May 30, 2025 9:57 am I always knew they would pull this shit. Great for preservation though. It's going to be an interesting time for comparisons when it eventually releases.

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri May 30, 2025 2:44 pm I'm astonished Anno resisted tweaking/reworking on 1.11 and 2.22, after he went and retouched 3.33 into 3.333 while working on 3.0+1.0

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by Allansfirebird » Fri May 30, 2025 4:57 pm I praise the completeness of this set, but good lord , $763 for the 28-disc, "big kahuna burger" version is insanity. The price gouging of the physical media market in Japan will never make sense to me. At least when G-Kids releases their version of this sometime next year (I assume), it should have a much more reasonable price point. I hope they finally do an English dub of the short Kitakami prologue to 3.0+1.0 as part of the package... but I'm not holding my breath. In addition to that, it would be great if they can offer the Funimation and Amazon dubs as alternate audio tracks on the first three Rebuilds.

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri May 30, 2025 8:18 pm That's kinda, uh, cute, lol. I can see so much confusion arising due to comparing 1.01 to 2.22 to 3.0 to 3.0+1.11 now! Also, White Leg Purple Shoulders Shikinami is much better than that travesty in 3.333.

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat May 31, 2025 3:03 am FelipeFritschF wrote: Also, White Leg Purple Shoulders Shikinami is much better than that travesty in 3.333.

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by Superblunt » Sat May 31, 2025 5:27 am Was about to say "what a cash grab", then I saw it includes ALL versions!! Take my money already!

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat May 31, 2025 5:32 am Table of content for the Rebuild movies ヱヴァンゲリヲン新劇場版：序 EVANGELION: 1.0 YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE.（Blu-ray）☆ EVANGELION: 1.01 YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE.（Blu-ray）★ EVANGELION: 1.11 YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE.（Blu-ray） EVANGELION: 1.11 YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE.（4K Ultra HD Blu-ray）☆ ヱヴァンゲリヲン新劇場版：破 EVANGELION: 2.0 YOU CAN (NOT) ADVANCE.（Blu-ray）☆ EVANGELION: 2.22 YOU CAN (NOT) ADVANCE.（Blu-ray） EVANGELION: 2.22 YOU CAN (NOT) ADVANCE.（4K Ultra HD Blu-ray）☆ ヱヴァンゲリヲン新劇場版：Q EVANGELION: 3.0 YOU CAN (NOT) REDO.（Blu-ray）☆ EVANGELION: 3.33 YOU CAN (NOT) REDO.（Blu-ray） EVANGELION: 3.333 YOU CAN (NOT) REDO.（Blu-ray） EVANGELION: 3.333 YOU CAN (NOT) REDO.（4K Ultra HD Blu-ray） シン・エヴァンゲリオン劇場版 EVANGELION:3.0+1.0 THRICE UPON A TIME（Blu-ray）☆ EVANGELION:3.0+1.01 THRICE UPON A TIME（Blu-ray）☆ EVANGELION:3.0+1.11 THRICE UPON A TIME（Blu-ray） EVANGELION:3.0+1.11 THRICE UPON A TIME（4K Ultra HD Blu-ray） Special Disc 01 Explanation of EVANGELION:1.01（Blu-ray） ★ Special Disc 02 映像特典（Blu-ray） Special Disc 03 映像特典（Blu-ray） ☆＝First time in home-video ★＝First time in Blu-Ray

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat May 31, 2025 5:59 am Note the Archives of NGE DVDs from 2015 are NOT included. TheFriskyIan wrote: No! They can't do this to me! I'm too poor right now!

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by penguintruth » Sat May 31, 2025 2:09 pm Allansfirebird wrote: I praise the completeness of this set, but good lord , $763 for the 28-disc, "big kahuna burger" version is insanity. The price gouging of the physical media market in Japan will never make sense to me. At least when G-Kids releases their version of this sometime next year (I assume), it should have a much more reasonable price point. I hope they finally do an English dub of the short Kitakami prologue to 3.0+1.0 as part of the package... but I'm not holding my breath. In addition to that, it would be great if they can offer the Funimation and Amazon dubs as alternate audio tracks on the first three Rebuilds.

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by Amitch__1991 » Sun Jun 01, 2025 7:52 am I'm hopeful that Anime Limited here in the UK will be releasing 4K versions of the first 3 rebuilds now that this has been announced, they recently released a 4K blu ray of 3.0 + 1.11, I'm wondering if they had a heads up that Khara would be releasing this set, and released a 4K version of 3.0 + 1.11 to test the waters to see if a 4K version would sell overseas. Or it could be completely coincidental !

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Jun 01, 2025 1:48 pm Also, the Limited Edition includes NGE, EoE and D&R. Google TL wrote: ■ "Neon Genesis Evangelion" DISC: 10 discs Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Series Episode 1 to 6 TV Series Episodes 7 to 12 TV Series Episode 13 to 18 TV series episodes 19 to 22 / video format version episodes 21 and 22 TV series episodes 23 to the final episode / video format version episodes 23 and 24 "Neon Genesis Evangelion: Death and Rebirth" + video bonus "Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion" + video bonus "Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion" + bonus footage "Neon Genesis Evangelion" bonus footage (Blu-ray) "Neon Genesis Evangelion" bonus footage (Blu-ray) Booklet (approx. 200 pages) Reprint booklet (176 pages) *The 10 Blu-ray discs of "Neon Genesis Evangelion" will have the same content as "NEON GENESIS EVANGELION STANDARD EDITION" (KIXA-870~9) released in 2019. *The reprinted booklet (176 pages) is a reprint of the booklet included in the "NEON GENESIS EVANGELION Blu-ray BOX" released in 2015.

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sun Jun 01, 2025 8:07 pm When I saw the news I was initially excited about the offer, but then I remembered it was a Japanese release... And now that I come here I see the price! Jeesh! I'm surprised they're releasing the cinema cuts of all movies. I know that's meant for the hardcore fans, but boy does it inflate the price. And even if some variation of this is released in the US at a price point where I could reasonably import it here, it will probably come again without "Fly me to the moon", soooo... Hard pass.

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Jun 02, 2025 1:53 am penguintruth wrote: Greedy corporations.

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by Jinroh » Mon Jun 02, 2025 2:02 pm I'm a big fan for these types of things; I already have all the Japanese blurays + the red dvd / blue bluray packs of the original series, but I fail to find any interest in this release. Ok cool they feature the theatrical releases and probably some upscaled versions of the first two movies in 4k, nothing that I personally find really interesting... Also it probably cements the fact that this is the definitive edition of what they want to do with this series and we can forget about some kind of in between movie that features third impact and develops the side characters...

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by cadrega86 » Wed Jun 11, 2025 6:00 pm I won't get the Japanese release, but I'm pretty happy that they are re-releasing all the versions of the movies, including the theatrical versions - can't wait for someone to do comparisons with the later home video versions. Hope the updated next time previews from the TV broadcasts are also included as bonus material, and that at the very least we finally get 3.333 in Italy.

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Mon Sep 01, 2025 4:49 am tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Concert for the 30th anniversary tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) They're also screening the films again, including D&R and EoE.

[]: Re: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Wed Oct 22, 2025 3:44 pm Did anyone actually bother getting these sets?
